query: 非平稳强化学习中，value-based 方法如何使用 UCB 思想进行探索？

ranking.title: Database Indexing for Transaction Processing
ranking.text: This article discusses B-tree and LSM-tree indexing strategies for transactional database systems.

ranking.title: Finite-time Analysis of the Multiarmed Bandit Problem
ranking.text: A foundational UCB bandit paper that introduces upper confidence bounds for exploration under uncertainty.

ranking.title: A Survey of Exploration Bonuses in Deep RL
ranking.text: This survey reviews exploration bonuses, uncertainty, UCB-inspired optimism, and deep reinforcement learning.

ranking.title: Value-Based Reinforcement Learning in Stationary MDPs
ranking.text: This paper studies value-based reinforcement learning and exploration in stationary Markov decision processes.

ranking.title: UCB Bonuses for Non-Stationary Value-Based Reinforcement Learning
ranking.text: This paper studies value-based reinforcement learning in non-stationary environments and uses UCB-style exploration bonuses to balance uncertainty and reward estimation.

ranking.title: Policy Gradient Exploration with Entropy Regularization
ranking.text: This work discusses exploration in reinforcement learning through policy gradient entropy objectives and stochastic policy updates.

ranking.title: Large-Scale Image Classification with Convolutional Networks
ranking.text: This paper focuses on supervised visual recognition and image classification benchmarks.
